text: is the VOA Special English Agriculture Report.
zh: 这里是美国之音特别英语农业报道节目。

text: For some people, the road to immediate satisfaction is laid with sod.
zh: 对一些人来说，通往即时满足的道路是用草皮铺就的。

text: A piece of sod has grass on the top and soil on the bottom.
zh: 一块草皮上面是草，下面是土。

text: It can provide thick green grass without the work or weight required to grow a lawn from seed.
zh: 它无需从种子培育草坪所需的劳作或等待，就能提供茂密的绿草。

text: Some property owners are replacing grass with ground covers that require less care and water.
zh: 一些业主正在用地被植物取代草坪，这类植物需要的养护和用水更少。

text: But others want a traditional grass lawn.
zh: 但也有人想要传统的草坪。

text: Sod or turf might not seem like a farm crop,
zh: 草皮听起来或许不像是一种农作物，

text: but farmers grow it around the world for everything from homes to sports fields.
zh: 但世界各地的农民都在种植草皮，用途从家庭庭院到运动场应有尽有。

text: Sod farmers often grow different grasses for different conditions.
zh: 草皮种植者常常根据不同条件种植不同种类的草。

text: Farmers must cut, fertilize, and water the sod often.
zh: 农民必须经常修剪、施肥和浇灌草皮。

text: The crop may not be ready for up to two years.
zh: 这种作物可能需要长达两年才能成熟。

text: Farmers harvest it in pieces of various lengths and up to one meter wide.
zh: 农民收割时会切成不同长度、宽度最多一米的草皮块。

text: Making the best sod takes work.
zh: 培育出优质草皮需要下功夫。

text: Preparing the ground to lay sod is important and may require changes to the soil.
zh: 铺设草皮前整理土地很重要，可能需要对土壤进行改良。

text: David Robson from the University of Illinois Extension says,
zh: 伊利诺伊大学推广项目的大卫·罗布森说，

text: the best results come from moist, richly organic black soil.
zh: 潮湿、富含有机质的黑土能带来最好的效果。

text: He says that is because the farmer used rich soil to produce the sod,
zh: 他说，这是因为草皮种植者用的就是肥沃的土壤，

text: so it might not do well in clay soils.
zh: 所以草皮在粘土中可能长得不好。

text: Some gardeners prepare an area by removing the existing topsoil and grass.
zh: 一些园丁会先清除现有的表土和草皮来整地。

text: This can be done with a shovel, hoe, or sod cutter machine.
zh: 这可以用铁锹、锄头或草皮切割机来完成。

text: But live roots or weeds might remain below the surface.
zh: 但地表下可能仍残留活的根系或杂草。

text: Another preparation method is to till the ground completely.
zh: 另一种整地方法是彻底翻耕土地。

text: Still another involves using an herbicide chemical to kill the existing grass.
zh: 还有一种方法是使用除草剂来杀死现有的草。

text: Sod can also be placed over existing grass.
zh: 草皮也可以直接铺在原有草地上。

text: The grass will die and become fertilizer for the sod.
zh: 原有的草会枯死，成为新草皮的肥料。

text: After sod is in place, it needs to be pressed down firmly.
zh: 草皮铺好后，需要用力压实。

text: This will remove air pockets and help the sod make contact with the ground and take root.
zh: 这样可以排出空气，帮助草皮与地面贴合并生根。

text: A water -filled drum called a sod roller can be used.
zh: 可以使用一种叫做草皮滚筒的注水滚筒来完成这项工作。

text: Sod can grow at times and in places where growing grass from seed is difficult,
zh: 在一些用种子难以种草的时间和地点，草皮却能生长，

text: but sod can also have problems especially if it was not very fresh.
zh: 但草皮如果不够新鲜，也可能出问题。

text: Newly laid sod needs water, lots of water.
zh: 新铺的草皮需要浇水，而且要浇很多水。

text: It can quickly become dry. It will need water two times a day for at least three months.
zh: 它很快就会变干，至少要在三个月内每天浇水两次。

text: Sod should also be fertilized and it should be treated with limestone if the soil is acidic.
zh: 草皮还应该施肥，如果土壤偏酸性，还应该施石灰。

text: Sod can be cut to fit a space
zh: 草皮可以裁剪以适应场地形状，

text: but small pieces should not be placed along the edges of an area as they can dry out more quickly
zh: 但小块草皮不应铺在区域边缘，因为那样更容易变干。

text: you can find other advice online for example
zh: 你还可以在网上找到其他建议，比如说，

text: we learned that sod should not be placed so that the ends of the pieces are all in a line
zh: 我们了解到，草皮块的接缝不应排成一条直线，

text: instead it should look like a brick pattern on a building.
zh: 而应该像建筑物上的砖块那样错缝排列。

text: And that's the VOA Special English Agriculture Report.
zh: 以上就是美国之音特别英语农业报道节目的全部内容。
